title: Method of selection - Including basis of selection | CanadaBuys

breadcrumbs.title: Importance of a clear procurement requirement
Completing the Security Requirements Check List

Compliance with the Canadian electrical code

structure_blocks.heading: Including basis of selection
structure_blocks.text: You, as the buyer, must include the appropriate basis of selection clauses in the solicitation documents. Common examples include the highest combined rating of technical merit and price, lowest evaluated price with mandatory technical criteria, and the highest rated within budget.

raw_text:
Including basis of selection

You, as the buyer, must include the appropriate basis of selection clauses in the solicitation documents. Common examples include the highest combined rating of technical merit and price, lowest evaluated price with mandatory technical criteria, and the highest rated within budget.
